title: Large Video to Transcript
description: Fallback normal-run input. For the simplest upload experience, use the Actor Standby upload page.

media.title: Upload video or audio
media.description: Fallback normal-run path: click Upload new files to choose an MP4, MOV, WebM, MP3, M4A, or WAV file, or paste a direct downloadable media URL. The primary product flow is the Standby upload page.
